name: Cauliflower Cheese Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter the bread and crumb it.
2. Chop the cauliflower and add to the mixture.
3. Blend the egg yolks, cottage cheese, onion, salt, and pepper until smooth.
4. Add the blended ingredients to the cauliflower mixture.
5. Beat the egg whites until stiff and fold them in gently.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 1-quart casserole dish set in a pan of hot water.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes or until firm.
